name: Lime Velvet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the jello in boiling water.
2. Add chunks of cream cheese to the dissolved jello and beat with a mixer at medium speed until well blended.
3. Chill until slightly congealed.
4. Mix in crushed pineapple with juice, celery, and chopped nuts.
5. Fold in whipped cream.
6. Pour into a mold and let set.
7. Turn out onto a lettuce leaf and garnish with cherries if desired.
